screen.notes: FINDING: No wireframe; dynamic routes. User list (plan, spend), detail, mutations. Operator-gated; testable: unauthenticated.

claim_rows.claim: Admin flows -- spend-cap-429-before-LLM, user suspend, signup toggle, audit log -- are functionality-verified live via a temporary admin account; formal closure needs operator-rotated admin credential (GATE-17)
claim_rows.method: Requires an admin session -- if no operator admin credential is configured, at minimum confirm /admin/* endpoints reject unauthenticated/non-admin requests (401/403); full flow test needs admin access (may be UNVERIFIABLE-FROM-UI without one)

claim_rows.claim: All 10 /admin/* routes are gated server-side on isAdmin: unauthenticated requests get 401, non-admin authenticated requests get 403 -- never client-side-only trust
claim_rows.method: curl each /admin/* endpoint with no auth (expect 401) and with a non-admin authenticated session (expect 403)

claim_rows.claim: The admin panel provides a data export/delete capability for user data
endpoints: (TBD - not explicitly listed in SCREEN-MATRIX's admin endpoint inventory; confirm exact path via admin UI network trace)
claim_rows.method: Requires admin access: locate the data export/delete control in the admin UI and exercise it

baseline_note: Baseline captures from Step 6 are under uat/reports/evidence/manual-verification/screens/ (folder named admin-users or admin-users_auth/admin-users_unauth or baseline/admin-users depending on sweep layout) — use as the 'before' record.
